title: HepG2 Mtb UNINFECTED, 0 hour, 1
treatment_protocol_ch1: HepG2 cells were infected with Mtb-H37Rv-mCherry at multipliction of infection 10 and sorted for mCherry positive cells at 0 hours (5 hours post infection) and 48 hours post infection.
growth_protocol_ch1: HepG2 cells were grown in DMEM-high glucose supplimented with 10% FBS and antibiotics in a humidified atmosphere at 37degree Celsius
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated using Macherey-Nagel (MN) Nucleospin RNA isolation kit
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Library was prepared using Illumina stranded total RNA prep kid as per manufacturer protocol
data_processing: The fastp tool was used to remove low qulaity reads and trimming the adapters.
data_processing.1: Processed reads were mapped to reference genome (reference: mm9) using hisat2 tool.
data_processing.2: Assembly and Quantification were done using stringtie. Further, DESeq2 used for the differential expression analysis.
data_processing.4: Supplementary files format and content: csv
